required_preferences.fact: Engages her niece with a mix of hands-on activities (art, building toys) and minimal screen time throughout the day to avoid tablet overuse during full-time childcare

supersedes.fact: Keeps her niece entertained with educational tablet apps during busy housework periods

required_preferences.fact: Limits screen-based work to four hours per shift; switches to non-screen administrative tasks or takes longer breaks once this threshold is reached, even if urgent calls are queued

supersedes.fact: Takes a five-minute screen break after every ten customer calls — never skips for urgent cases

required_preferences.fact: Uses a dedicated food journal app nightly to track symptoms and flag potential IBS triggers from meals
Relies on prepping elimination diet-compliant lunches and snacks at home every evening for workdays, adjusting recipes weekly per doctor's guidance
Brings home-cooked, easy-to-digest meals to her mother during weekday visits, researching recipes suited for post-operative recovery
Follows her prescribed physical therapy exercises at home every evening — prioritizing this over other fitness routines during recovery

persona: An entry-level support agent at a regional telecommunications provider
